$comment: ADOS reference domains for repository cataloging. Domain means body of knowledge governing correctness/evidence.
materiality_test: If changing the label changes no correctness, evidence, risk, vocabulary, or reference class, it is not a material domain.
drift_guards: Domain is not Archetype, delivery format, tool, or repository.
Do not choose software_engineering as primary merely because software implements the product.
Secondary domain always appears as complete domain/subdomain pair.

domains.label: Developer tools
domains.governs: Developer workflow, tool integration, maintainability, ergonomics.

domains.label: AI / machine learning
domains.governs: Model behavior, evaluation validity, grounding, prompt/tool correctness.

domains.label: Information security
domains.governs: Threats, vulnerabilities, data protection, secure handling.

domains.label: Data engineering
domains.governs: Data correctness, transformation, lineage, schema compliance.

domains.label: Personal knowledge management
domains.governs: Recall accuracy, provenance, privacy, personal knowledge organization.

domains.label: General knowledge
domains.governs: Everyday factual correctness when no specialized domain governs.
